current_life_events: Elderly parents are moving in due to declining health, causing tension with them and her sister over care responsibilities; a new, high-pressure project at work is taking a toll on her mental health; feeling isolated from friends after the recent loss.
mental_state: Feeling overwhelmed by the added caregiving responsibilities and work stress, while struggling to cope with the emotional aftermath of her friend's passing.
why_bringing_these_up_now: The impending life change of her parents moving in, combined with work pressure and lingering grief, has heightened her anxiety and self-doubt, making these issues feel insurmountable.
